contact.wechat: English and Mandarin communication available for owners, tenants, and partners.

footer.title: Commercial property management for active assets.
footer.text: LeCrown supports warehouse, office, and corporate properties with clear communication, organized coordination, and dependable follow-through.
footer.supportNote: Benjamin LaGrone and Jessica Huang are available for owner, tenant, and management inquiries.
footer.bottomLine: Serving Houston-area owners, tenants, and commercial partners.

hero.title: Management support for warehouse, office, and corporate properties.
hero.summary: LeCrown handles tenant communication, vendor coordination, maintenance follow-through, and owner updates for commercial assets that need steady day-to-day oversight.

brief.title: The daily work we take on.
brief.text: Our work centers on communication, coordination, and keeping open issues from stalling.

scopeHeading.title: Core service areas
scopeHeading.text: Support is scoped around the building, the tenants, and the reporting needs of ownership.

deliveryHeading.title: Direct communication. Reliable follow-through.
deliveryHeading.text: Good property management is not just maintenance. It is clear ownership of issues, fast updates, and consistent execution.

brief.title: Why owners usually call.
brief.text: LeCrown is often brought in when communication is inconsistent, open items sit too long, or the owner wants a stronger management presence.
points: Clear reporting in English or Mandarin

ctaBanner.title: Tell us what is not getting handled.
ctaBanner.text: A short conversation is enough to review the asset, the operating issues, and the right management scope.

hero.title: Asset types we support.

brief.title: Commercial buildings with active operating needs.

gridHeading.title: Management pressure looks different by asset type.
gridHeading.text: Different buildings create different expectations. We match communication, coordination, and oversight to the asset.

handoffHeading.eyebrow: What can move off your desk

handoffHeading.text: The common thread is day-to-day coordination that needs a consistent point of contact and cleaner follow-through.
